metadata.method_name: M2 — Cross-Dictionary Replication of the iter-4 auditability spine on a second Gemma-Scope SAE
metadata.description: Re-run the homograph recall-holes + KG-repair FDR survivors + Georgia/Jordan surgical edits + recall-hole/firing-Jaccard router on a SECOND Gemma-Scope SAE dictionary of the SAME frozen gemma-2-2b (PR...

honest_negatives: taxonomic/Jordan/kg_ktrack: KG-add buys no measurable fix beyond random (gain_kg=0.008, random p95=0.032, CI=-0.009..0.016, p=0.5778)

k_localization.conclusion: KG names exactly one addable auditable latent per sub-context; the (k) example-reweighting probe yields a dense hyperplane that does NOT localize to any single SAE latent -> no per-sub-context handle.

honest_negatives: numeric/integer/kg_ktrack: KG-add buys no measurable fix beyond random (gain_kg=0.000, random p95=0.020, CI=-0.005..-0.004, p=1.0000)

k_localization.conclusion: KG names exactly one addable auditable latent per sub-context; the (k) example-reweighting probe yields a dense hyperplane that does NOT localize to any single SAE latent -> no per-sub-context handle.

honest_negatives: first_letter_L/long/kg_ktrack: KG-add buys no measurable fix beyond random (gain_kg=0.000, random p95=0.000, CI=-0.010..-0.006, p=1.0000)

k_localization.conclusion: KG names exactly one addable auditable latent per sub-context; the (k) example-reweighting probe yields a dense hyperplane that does NOT localize to any single SAE latent -> no per-sub-context handle.
